message.content:
@startuml
title 分页查询运单时序图

participant "Query Request" as QueryRequest
participant "TradeBillController" as TradeBillController
participant "TradeBillService" as TradeBillService
participant "TradeBillGoodsService" as TradeBillGoodsService
participant "LossesService" as LossesService

QueryRequest -> TradeBillController : 1 发送 分页查询条件
activate TradeBillController
TradeBillController --> TradeBillController : 2 checkPageQueryParams() 校验分页查询参数
TradeBillController -> TradeBillService : 3 pageData() 调用运单分页查询方法
activate TradeBillService
TradeBillService --> TradeBillController : 4 返回运单分页数据
deactivate TradeBillService
TradeBillController -> TradeBillGoodsService : 5 countByTradeBillId() 统计单条交易单的商品信息集合
activate TradeBillGoodsService
TradeBillGoodsService --> TradeBillController : 6 countByTradeBillId() 统计单条交易单的挂账信息集合
deactivate TradeBillGoodsService
TradeBillController -> LossesService : 7 generateTradeBillData() 将查询数据整合
activate LossesService
LossesService --> TradeBillController : 8 返回查询结果
deactivate LossesService
TradeBillController --> QueryRequest : 返回查询结果
deactivate TradeBillController

@enduml
